name: chr20p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 20 p-arm pericentric flank (20p11.1-20p11.21), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr20 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D20Z1/D20Z2), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: Dual alpha-sat HOR (D20Z1/D20Z2) + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline.
